meta-description: Learn about generic drugs by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Generic drugs
excerpt: A prescription drug that has the same active-ingredient formula as a brand-name drug. Generic drugs usually cost less than brand-name drugs. The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) rates these drugs to be as safe and effective as brand-name drugs.
